title: Trump trades millions in stocks while promoting companies
shortDescription: Trump traded millions in stocks while promoting companies such as Nvidia, Apple and Microsoft, which critics said raised ethical concerns.

title: Texas GOP Senate runoff voting begins as Democrat ties in new poll
shortDescription: Early voting begins in the Texas GOP Senate runoff as a new poll shows Democrat James Talarico tied with both Cornyn and Paxton for November.

title: What's next for Trump's ballroom after $1 billion setback in Senate?
shortDescription: The Senate parliamentarian ruled $1 billion in security for President Trump's ballroom project needs 60 votes, not a simple majority, to pass.

title: Hochul says president 'encouraged' LIRR strike; can Trump end it?
shortDescription: President Trump wrote that he could help with negotiations as the LIRR strike continues.

title: Trump drops $10B IRS lawsuit amid reports of $1.7B fund for his allies
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and his family dropped a lawsuit May 18 seeking $10 billion from the IRS for not preventing the disclosure of his tax returns.

title: Senate hopeful Haley Stevens booed during Democratic convention
shortDescription: Representative Haley Stevens was met with boos while giving a speech at the Michigan Democratic Endorsement Convention in Detroit on Sunday, April 19.

title: Trump posts AI-generated image of himself beside a handcuffed alien
shortDescription: The posts come a week after the Pentagon released what it described as "never-before-seen" documents on unidentified flying objects.

title: Trump approval rating sinks to term low in new poll amid Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating hit a new low in a New York Times/Siena poll out May 18. Reponses showed unease about the war in Iran and prices.

title: Trump vs. Massie in Kentucky primary
shortDescription: President Donald Trump endorsed Captain Ed Gallrein for Congress, who is running against incumbent Republican Thomas Massie in Kentucky.

title: Election Day voting guide in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania primary election
shortDescription: Pennsylvania's primary election will take place on May 19. Here's everything Allegheny County voters need to know for Election Day.

title: See photos, video from Trump's national prayer event in Washington
shortDescription: The prayer event was billed as an "assembly of voices united by a love of God and country" tied to the nation's 250th birthday.

title: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' as Iran talks stall, oil prices rise
shortDescription: The drone strike at a nuclear plant in the United Arab Emirates occurred after Iranian and U.S. officials rejected each other's negotiating positions.

title: Election officials prepare for federal interference
shortDescription: Election officials are preparing for potential federal interference in midterm elections, including FBI visits and National Guard presence.

title: As midterms loom, some Republicans eye an exit from Capitol Hill
shortDescription: In an exclusive interview with USA TODAY, the nation's top GOP governor urged Republicans to run on affordability. But will Trump get in their way?

title: Trump eyes Kentucky's Massie in latest MAGA purge
shortDescription: The president has endorsed retired Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein in what marks his most aggressive attempt to catapult a dissenter from the Republican Party.

title: Trump prayer rally takes over National Mall
shortDescription: Thousands of Christians gathered on National Mall to participate in Rededicate 250, a prayer rally put together at the request of President Trump.

title: 'Pray without ceasing.' Trump, aides rally Christian faithful on National Mall
shortDescription: Faith leaders from various Christian denominations − and one rabbi − gathered on the National Mall to pray, sing and honor America's religious foundation.

title: America's 250th opens with Trump, prayer and a fight
shortDescription: The semiquincentennial of the Declaration of Independence is underscoring not only the nation's history but also its current divisions.

title: Trump-backed Republican tops Louisiana primary
shortDescription: Incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy lost the GOP Senate primary in Louisiana to a Trump-backed candidate after voting against Trump in his second impeachment.

title: Who is Julia Letlow? Trump-backed Republican defeats Bill Cassidy
shortDescription: Rep. Julia Letlow became a congresswoman after replacing her late husband, Luke.

title: Federal funding for Trump's ballroom in jeopardy after Senate ruling
shortDescription: A Senate official removed security funding that could be used for President Donald Trump's planned White House ballroom from a massive spending package.

title: Dems have momentum in Florida. But can they reverse state's MAGA shift?
shortDescription: Florida seemed to lose its swing state status after big Republican victories in 2022 and 2024, but Democrats lately have been flipping GOP seats.

title: Cassidy loses bid to survive Trump's wrath in Louisiana Senate battle
shortDescription: Congresswoman Julia Letlow advances to runoff in the Pelican State, the latest stop on the president's revenge tour against Republican dissenters.

title: Trump threatens to primary 'weak-minded' Boebert over Massie support
shortDescription: Rep. Lauren Boebert campaigned on May 16 on behalf of her House colleague Rep. Thomas Massie, who President Trump has vowed to unseat in Kentucky.

title: ICE detained US citizen in NYC, now congressman wants investigation
shortDescription: Surveillance and cellphone footage captured the May 6 incident in the Bronx, where ICE agents detained the American citizen at gunpoint.
